title: Clickup vs Asana vs Monday.com (2020)
description: What is the best project management software for small teams? We compared Clickup, Asana and Monday.com to answer that question. The answer for our small marketing team was simple, Clickup wins. Find out if Clickup is the right project and task management tool for your team. See how these tools stack up in task management, workflow, ease of use, automation, integrations and, of course, pricing.
